name: Connecticut DPH Asbestos Contractor Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify current license and accreditation status in eLicense
licenseTypesIncluded: Asbestos consultant licenses and related individual certifications
knownExclusions: Contractor licenses and individual supervisor, worker, and consultant credentials have distinct scopes and renewal rules.
Federal, DEEP, OSHA, municipal, notification, and project-specific requirements are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Use the official lookup and roster instructions without bypassing controls.
publicRecordsNotes: Official asbestos-license metadata only. License status does not by itself establish project-specific compliance.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DPH publishes instructions for obtaining current listings, but no stable redistribution-reviewed machine interface is confirmed.
researchNotes: DPH states that asbestos contractors and consultants must be licensed. The source remains a manual official handoff until roster/export terms and fields are reviewed.
verificationCaveats: Contractor, consultant, supervisor, and worker credentials are not interchangeable.
A license record does not replace accreditation or project-notification checks.
verificationNotes: No supported adapter is exposed for the shared eLicense path.
maintainerNotes: Preserve credential discipline and accreditation caveats in future mappings.

researchEvidence.note: Official DPH page states that asbestos contractors and consultants must be licensed and directs verification to eLicense.

blocker.summary: No stable, redistribution-reviewed machine-readable roster or lookup contract has been confirmed.
